title: Public Health & Society major draws strong student interest
summary_en: The Arts & Sciences-based program meets rising demand, combining rigorous interdisciplinary study with hands-on community experience, preparing students to tackle complex health challenges across fields.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）公共卫生与社会专业受到学生广泛青睐

title: Charlie White appointed dean of Sam Fox School
summary_en: Charlie White, the highly regarded artist and academic leader whose vision and student advocacy have helped to build nationally recognized programs at Carnegie Mellon University and the University of Southern California, has been named the Ralph J. Nagel Dean of WashU’s Sam Fox School, announced Chancellor Andrew D. Martin.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学任命查理·怀特为山姆·福克斯设计与视觉艺术学院院长

title: Class Acts: Cela Lopez
summary_en: WashU senior Cela Lopez is studying political science so, of course, she’s interested in politics and policy. But what she really cares about is how we think about those topics.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）高年级学生塞拉·洛佩兹多项政治心理学研究取得进展 将赴西北大学攻读博士学位

title: Class Acts: Beverly Lobo and Jaden Lanza
summary_en: WashU Law students Beverly Lobo and Jaden Lanza are conducting a large-scale empirical research project that sits at the intersection of law and data science and could impact imprisonment in America.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学法学院两名学生开展法学与数据科学交叉实证研究 成果或影响美国监禁制度

title: Braver elected to American Academy of Arts & Sciences
summary_en: WashU neuroscientist Todd Braver has been elected to the American Academy of Arts & Sciences, one of the nation’s most prestigious honorary societies.
title_cn: 托德·布雷弗当选美国艺术与科学院院士

title: Huang installed as inaugural Davie professor
summary_en: Eric Huang, MD, PhD, a leader in the study of human brain development, has been named the inaugural Joseph M. Davie Distinguished Professor in Pathology & Immunology at WashU Medicine.
title_cn: 埃里克·J·黄就任华盛顿大学医学院首任约瑟夫·M·戴维杰出教授

title: Looser mortgage lending rules, regulation will destabilize financial system
summary_en: A new executive order signed by President Donald Trump threatens to destabilize the financial system by reducing lending regulations and rolling back oversight, according to Brittany Lewis at WashU Olin Business School.
title_cn: 专家警告放松抵押贷款放贷规则及监管将破坏金融体系稳定
